content:
Hi! perfect fit for CoC! :)

Small typos: "create it's mirror version" / "replacing each digit with it's mirror equivalent." should be changed to: "create its mirror version" / "replacing each digit with its mirror equivalent."
Also maybe consider adding a pair of test with mixed string (valid + invalid digits) as your INVALID test (347) only contains invalid digits...

Thanks for your comment!
I'm trying to make more test cases. Pls wait!

Goal
* Please change "it's" to "its".

* Please format the mirror map using the multi-line monospace syntax (3 backticks before and after the block of the text), like this:
```
(some text)
(some more text)
(some more text)
```

* Please clarify what is meant by an "invalid digit".

* Please format "INVALID" as a {{constant}}.

Output
* Please format "INVALID" as a {{constant}}.

Constraints
* Please update the upper bound.

Cases
* Each test and its validator should cover the *SAME SCENARIO* scenario but with slightly different inputs and outputs (except for the INVALID cases). Please revise the cases accordingly. For example,
  • Pair 1 is simple.
  • One of the middle pairs cover [[s]] with a few leading 0s.
  • The second last pair contains long "invalid" cases.
  • The last pair contains long "valid" cases.
  (These are just examples and you should need more than 4 pairs of cases in total.)

Thanks.
